calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Second Motion For Disbursement Of Client Trust Account Funds; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's Second Motion For Disbursement Of Client Trust Account Funds.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The State Bar of California's unopposed "second motion for disbursement of client trust account funds" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Disbursement Of Client Trust Account Funds; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Disbursement Of Client Trust Account Funds.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Order To Show Cause (Added Per Order Filed 7/2/20)
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Alexander Binder for Petitioner, State Bar of California

Hearing held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court accepts representation from Mr. Binder that a proof of service re: OSC was sent to Mr. O'Connor on July 2nd, and instructs Mr. Binder to file the written proof of service. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause (Added Per Order Filed 7/2/20): this court assumes jurisdiction over the law practice of James Coy Driscoll and appoints the State Bar of California and its designees.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
